semantic.role: Protocol type definitions re-export barrel file. Serves as the public entry point for all protocol type definitions, allowing external modules to import from a single location while keeping the implementation split across domain-specific files under src/types/protocol.
responsibilities: Provide a unified import surface for all protocol type definitions by re-exporting from src/types/protocol/index.js.
Abstract the internal domain split of protocol types, enabling callers to import from a single path.
Prevent importing from internal protocol submodules directly, enforcing the module boundary.
outOfScope: No type definitions or implementation logic are declared in this file.
No runtime behavior, validation, or processing is performed.
No orchestration or conversion of data occurs here.
invariants: The file must always re-export all symbols from './protocol/index.js' (via `export *`).
No additional exports or imports should be added to this file; it must remain a pure re-export facade.
The file path must remain as src/types/protocol.ts to maintain the public API contract.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a clean, public protocol facade that decouples internal protocol organization from external consumption, keeping the import surface stable even as the protocol submodule is restructured.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial creation of the protocol facade as part of the ArchSpine v1.0.0 release, establishing the foundational architecture for type definitions.

publicSurface.description: Re-exports all type definitions from src/types/protocol/index.js. External modules import from this file to access all protocol-related types without depending on internal module structure.
